ddls:
CREATE TABLE "loans" (
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan */,
  "loan_range" TEXT /* Range of the loan amount */,
  "business_name" TEXT /* Name of the business */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the business */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the business is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the business is located */,
  "zip" INTEGER /* ZIP code of the business */,
  "naics_code" INTEGER /* NAICS code of the business */,
  "business_type" TEXT /* Type of business (e.g., Corporation, Non-Profit Organization) */,
  "race_ethnicity" TEXT /* Race/ethnicity of the business owner */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the business owner */,
  "veteran" TEXT /* Veteran status of the business owner */,
  "non_profit" TEXT /* Non-profit status of the business */,
  "jobs_retained" INTEGER /* Number of jobs retained by the business */,
  "date_approved" TEXT /* Date the loan was approved */,
  "lender" TEXT /* Name of the lender */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the businesses table */,
  "loan_type_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the loan_types table */,
  "lender_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the lenders table */,
  "loan_amount" REAL /* Actual loan amount applied for */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate of the loan */,
  "loan_term" INTEGER /* Term of the loan in months */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the loan (e.g., approved, pending, rejected) */,
  "repayment_plan" TEXT /* Repayment plan details */,
  "guarantee_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the loan guaranteed by the agency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_lender_id FOREIGN KEY ("lender_id") REFERENCES lenders ("lender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_loan_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_type_id") REFERENCES loan_types ("loan_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "businesses" (
  "business_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each business */,
  "business_name" TEXT /* Name of the business */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the business */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the business is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the business is located */,
  "zip" INTEGER /* ZIP code of the business */,
  "naics_code" INTEGER /* NAICS code of the business */,
  "business_type" TEXT /* Type of business (e.g., Corporation, Non-Profit Organization) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the business */,
  "ownership_type" TEXT /* Type of ownership (e.g., sole proprietorship, partnership) */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL */,
  "date_founded" TEXT /* Date the business was founded */,
  "number_of_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the business */,
  "annual_revenue" REAL /* Annual revenue of the business */,
  "credit_score" INTEGER /* Credit score of the business */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_types" (
  "loan_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan type */,
  "loan_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the loan type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the loan type */,
  "maximum_loan_amount" REAL /* Maximum loan amount for this type */,
  "minimum_loan_amount" REAL /* Minimum loan amount for this type */,
  "maximum_interest_rate" REAL /* Maximum interest rate for this type */,
  "minimum_interest_rate" REAL /* Minimum interest rate for this type */,
  "guarantee_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the loan guaranteed by the agency */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Eligibility criteria for the loan type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lenders" (
  "lender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lender */,
  "lender_name" TEXT /* Name of the lender */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the lender */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the lender is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the lender is located */,
  "zip" INTEGER /* ZIP code of the lender */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the lender */,
  "number_of_loans" INTEGER /* Number of loans provided by the lender */,
  "total_loan_amount" REAL /* Total amount of loans provided by the lender */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "naics_codes" (
  "naics_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each NAICS code */,
  "naics_code" INTEGER /* NAICS code */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the NAICS code */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector to which the NAICS code belongs (e.g., Manufacturing, Finance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("naics_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_types" (
  "business_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each business type */,
  "business_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the business type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the business type */,
  "registration_requirements" TEXT /* Registration requirements for the business type */,
  "tax_implications" TEXT /* Tax implications for the business type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("business_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_approvals" (
  "loan_approval_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan approval */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan that was approved */,
  "date_approved" TEXT /* Date the loan was approved */,
  "amount_approved" REAL /* Amount of the loan that was approved */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Status of the approval (e.g., approved, rejected, pending) */,
  "approval_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the approval or rejection */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who approved the loan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_approval_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_approvals_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_disbursements" (
  "loan_disbursement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan disbursement */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan that was disbursed */,
  "date_disbursed" TEXT /* Date the loan was disbursed */,
  "amount_disbursed" REAL /* Amount of the loan that was disbursed */,
  "disbursement_status" TEXT /* Status of the disbursement (e.g., disbursed, pending) */,
  "disbursement_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the disbursement or delay */,
  "disbursed_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who disbursed the loan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_disbursement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_disbursements_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_payments" (
  "loan_payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan payment */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan that was paid */,
  "date_paid" TEXT /* Date the loan was paid */,
  "amount_paid" REAL /* Amount of the loan that was paid */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., paid, missed, late) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., check, electronic transfer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_payments_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., loan officer, analyst, administrator) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the data */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan that was accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "historical_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data record */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "amount_approved" REAL /* Amount approved */,
  "amount_disbursed" REAL /* Amount disbursed */,
  "amount_paid" REAL /* Amount paid */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the loan in the historical record */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate of the loan in the historical record */,
  "loan_term" INTEGER /* Term of the loan in the historical record */,
  "repayment_plan" TEXT /* Repayment plan details in the historical record */,
  "guarantee_percentage" REAL /* Guarantee percentage in the historical record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_ownership" (
  "business_ownership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each business ownership record */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the owner */,
  "owner_type" TEXT /* Type of owner (e.g., individual, corporation) */,
  "percentage_ownership" REAL /* Percentage of ownership */,
  "date_acquired" TEXT /* Date the ownership was acquired */,
  "ownership_status" TEXT /* Status of the ownership (e.g., active, transferred) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("business_ownership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_ownership_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_collateral" (
  "loan_collateral_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan collateral record */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan */,
  "collateral_type" TEXT /* Type of collateral (e.g., property, equipment) */,
  "collateral_value" REAL /* Value of the collateral */,
  "collateral_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the collateral */,
  "collateral_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the collateral (e.g., excellent, good, fair) */,
  "collateral_location" TEXT /* Location of the collateral */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_collateral_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_collateral_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)
